name: radar-chart
description: Unified radar chart component supporting all variations: basic, multiple, grid-circle, grid-filled, dots, lines-only, and custom-label configurations

indicators.name: indicators
indicators.description: Indicator definitions: dimension names and optional max per axis. Length must match each series value array. Example: [{name: 'Sales', max: 6500}, {name: 'Marketing', max: 25000}]

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data. Single series (number[]) or multiple named series (Array<{name?: string, value: number[]}>). Example: [4200, 3000, 20000] or [{name: 'Series A', value: [4200, 3000, 20000]}]

symbol.name: symbol
symbol.description: Symbol type for data points. Set to 'none' to hide. Options: 'none', 'circle', 'rect', 'roundRect', 'triangle', 'diamond', 'pin', 'arrow'. Default: 'none'

symbolSize.name: symbolSize
symbolSize.description: Size of the symbol. Number, [width, height], or function. Used when symbol is not 'none'.

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for named series. Default: false

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to show emphasis (highlight) when interacting with the chart. Default: true

showIndicatorLabels.name: showIndicatorLabels
showIndicatorLabels.description: Whether to show indicator (axis) labels. Default: true

showSplitLine.name: showSplitLine
showSplitLine.description: Whether to show split lines (grid) for the radar. Default: true

showAxisLine.name: showAxisLine
showAxisLine.description: Whether to show axis line for each indicator. Default: true

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']
